figures.caption: Table 2: Main results. TSR = Task Success Rate (%), SCR = Subgoal Completion Rate (%), RSR = Recovery Success Rate (%). CALVIN = avg. completed chains (max 5). ±: std over 3 seeds. LoRA (50K) uses the same rollout budget as SV training. Bold: best overall.

Figure 1: HELM overview. (a) Three structural failure modes in long-horizon VLA execution: FM (memory gap, blue), FV (verification gap, orange), and FR (recovery gap, red). (b) HELM execution loop: the EMM retrieves task-history context mt; the learned SV predicts failure probability pfail from memory-augmented context; and the HC implements rollback and replanning.
Table 5: Per-task TSR (%) on LIBERO-LONG. Tasks ordered by subgoal count.
